meta.name: Stranger Things
meta.description: When a young boy vanishes, a small town uncovers a mystery involving secret experiments, terrifying supernatural forces, and one strange little girl.

videos.title: Chapter One: The Vanishing of Will Byers
videos.overview: On his way home from a friend's house, young Will sees something terrifying. Nearby, a sinister secret lurks in the depths of a government lab.

videos.title: Chapter Two: The Weirdo on Maple Street
videos.overview: Lucas, Mike and Dustin try to talk to the girl they found in the woods. Hopper questions an anxious Joyce about an unsettling phone call.

videos.title: Chapter Three: Holly, Jolly
videos.overview: An increasingly concerned Nancy looks for Barb and finds out what Jonathan's been up to. Joyce is convinced Will is trying to talk to her.

videos.title: Chapter Four: The Body
videos.overview: Refusing to believe Will is dead, Joyce tries to connect with her son. The boys give Eleven a makeover. Nancy and Jonathan form an unlikely alliance.

videos.title: Chapter Five: The Flea and the Acrobat
videos.overview: Hopper breaks into the lab while Nancy and Jonathan confront the force that took Will. The boys ask Mr. Clarke how to travel to another dimension.

videos.title: Chapter Six: The Monster
videos.overview: A frantic Jonathan looks for Nancy in the darkness, but Steve's looking for her, too. Hopper and Joyce uncover the truth about the lab's experiments.

videos.title: Chapter Seven: The Bathtub
videos.overview: Eleven struggles to reach Will, while Lucas warns that "the bad men are coming." Nancy and Jonathan show the police what Jonathan caught on camera.

videos.title: Chapter Eight: The Upside Down
videos.overview: Dr. Brenner holds Hopper and Joyce for questioning while the boys wait with Eleven in the gym. Back at Will's, Nancy and Jonathan prepare for battle.

videos.title: Chapter One: MADMAX
videos.overview: As the town preps for Halloween, a high-scoring rival shakes things up at the arcade, and a skeptical Hopper inspects a field of rotting pumpkins.

videos.title: Chapter Two: Trick or Treat, Freak
videos.overview: After Will sees something terrible on trick-or-treat night, Mike wonders whether Eleven's still out there. Nancy wrestles with the truth about Barb.

videos.title: Chapter Three: The Pollywog
videos.overview: Dustin adopts a strange new pet, and Eleven grows increasingly impatient. A well-meaning Bob urges Will to stand up to his fears.

videos.title: Chapter Four: Will the Wise
videos.overview: An ailing Will opens up to Joyce -- with disturbing results. While Hopper digs for the truth, Eleven unearths a surprising discovery.

videos.title: Chapter Five: Dig Dug
videos.overview: Nancy and Jonathan swap conspiracy theories with a new ally as Eleven searches for someone from her past. “Bob the Brain” tackles a difficult problem.

videos.title: Chapter Six: The Spy
videos.overview: Will's connection to a shadowy evil grows stronger, but no one's quite sure how to stop it. Elsewhere, Dustin and Steve forge an unlikely bond.

videos.title: Chapter Seven: The Lost Sister
videos.overview: Psychic visions draw Eleven to a band of violent outcasts and an angry girl with a shadowy past.

videos.title: Chapter Eight: The Mind Flayer
videos.overview: An unlikely hero steps forward when a deadly development puts the Hawkins Lab on lockdown, trapping Will and several others inside.

videos.title: Chapter Nine: The Gate
videos.overview: Eleven makes plans to finish what she started while the survivors turn up the heat on the monstrous force that's holding Will hostage.

videos.title: Chapter One: Suzie, Do You Copy?
videos.overview: Summer brings new jobs and budding romance. But the mood shifts when Dustin's radio picks up a Russian broadcast, and Will senses something is wrong.

videos.title: Chapter Two: The Mall Rats
videos.overview: Nancy and Jonathan follow a lead, Steve and Robin sign on to a secret mission, and Max and Eleven go shopping. A rattled Billy has troubling visions.

videos.title: Chapter Three: The Case of the Missing Lifeguard
videos.overview: With El and Max looking for Billy, Will declares a day without girls. Steve and Dustin go on a stakeout, and Joyce and Hopper return to Hawkins Lab.

videos.title: Chapter Four: The Sauna Test
videos.overview: A code red brings the gang back together to face a frighteningly familiar evil. Karen urges Nancy to keep digging, and Robin finds a useful map.

videos.title: Chapter Five: The Flayed
videos.overview: Strange surprises lurk inside an old farmhouse and deep beneath the Starcourt Mall. Meanwhile, the Mind Flayer is gathering strength.

videos.title: Chapter Six: E Pluribus Unum
videos.overview: Dr. Alexei reveals what the Russians have been building, and Eleven sees where Billy has been. Dustin and Erica stage a daring rescue.

videos.title: Chapter Seven: The Bite
videos.overview: With time running out -- and an assassin close behind -- Hopper's crew races back to Hawkins, where El and the kids are preparing for war.

videos.title: Chapter Eight: The Battle of Starcourt
videos.overview: Terror reigns in the food court when the Mind Flayer comes to collect. But down below, in the dark, the future of the world is at stake.

videos.title: Chapter One: The Hellfire Club
videos.overview: El is bullied at school. Joyce opens a mysterious package. A scrappy player shakes up D&D night.

videos.title: Chapter Two: Vecna's Curse
videos.overview: A plane brings Mike to California — and a dead body brings Hawkins to a halt. Nancy goes looking for leads. A shaken Eddie tells the gang what he saw.

videos.title: Chapter Three: The Monster and the Superhero
videos.overview: Murray and Joyce fly to Alaska, and El faces serious consequences. Robin and Nancy dig up dirt on Hawkins' demons. Dr. Owens delivers sobering news.

videos.title: Chapter Four: Dear Billy
videos.overview: Max is in grave danger... and running out of time. A patient at Pennhurst asylum has visitors. Elsewhere, in Russia, Hopper is hard at work.

videos.title: Chapter Five: The Nina Project
videos.overview: Owens takes El to Nevada, where she's forced to confront her past, while the Hawkins kids comb a crumbling house for clues. Vecna claims another victim.

videos.title: Chapter Six: The Dive
videos.overview: Behind the Iron Curtain, a risky rescue mission gets underway. The California crew seeks help from a hacker. Steve takes one for the team.

videos.title: Chapter Seven: The Massacre at Hawkins Lab
videos.overview: As Hopper braces to battle a monster, Dustin dissects Vecna's motives — and decodes a message from beyond. El finds strength in a distant memory.

videos.title: Chapter Eight: Papa
videos.overview: Nancy has sobering visions, and El passes an important test. Back in Hawkins, the gang gathers supplies and prepares for battle.

videos.title: Chapter Nine: The Piggyback
videos.overview: With selfless hearts and a clash of metal, heroes fight from every corner of the battlefield to save Hawkins — and the world itself.

videos.title: Chapter One: The Crawl
videos.overview: November, 1987. The gang evades the military to scour the Upside Down for Vecna — but fails to notice a threat lurking closer to home.

videos.title: Chapter Two: The Vanishing of...
videos.overview: After a vicious attack at the Wheeler home, Mike and Nancy confront the cost of secrecy, while El and Hopper embark on a rescue mission.

videos.title: Chapter Three: The Turnbow Trap
videos.overview: Will gains unique insight into Vecna's next move, giving the crew an opportunity to set a trap. Holly explores her new surroundings.

videos.title: Chapter Four: Sorcerer
videos.overview: The military tightens its grip on the town. Mike, Lucas and Robin orchestrate a daring escape. El comes face-to-face with the enemy.

videos.title: Chapter Five: Shock Jock
videos.overview: The gang hatches an electrifying plan to reconnect Will to the hive mind. Tensions flare during a search of the Upside Down's Hawkins Lab.

videos.title: Chapter Six: Escape from Camazotz
videos.overview: As Holly and Max fight to escape Vecna's mind, El must find a way into Will's. Joyce wrestles with guilt. Jonathan and Nancy face a turning point.

videos.title: Chapter Seven: The Bridge
videos.overview: On the anniversary of Will's disappearance, the party reunites to prepare for a battle with world-altering implications.

videos.title: Chapter Eight: The Rightside Up
videos.overview: As Vecna prepares to destroy the world as we know it, the party must put everything on the line to defeat him once and for all.

meta.awards: Won 12 Primetime Emmys. 118 wins & 338 nominations total
